metadata.title: DHCP | Home Services Platform
metadata.description: Expert home services and electronics maintenance platform in Dubai and Saudi Arabia.

regionSelector.title: Welcome to Dammam Home care pro
regionSelector.subtitle: Choose your location for local pricing.
regionSelector.verifiedLabel: Verified experts available in both regions

hero.description: Dubai & Saudi Arabia's top-rated maintenance platform. From sudden AC breakdowns to emergency plumbing, our vetted experts arrive at your doorstep in record time.

promotionBanner.description: We stand by our professional workmanship. If any issue arises within 30 days of completion, we'll fix it for free.

featuresShowcase.premiumWorkmanshipDesc: Our technicians are master craftsmen with years of hands-on experience. We don't just fix problems; we ensure they stay fixed with industry-leading precision and care.
featuresShowcase.warrantyDesc: We stand behind our work. If any issue re-occurs within 30 days, we fix it for free. No hidden costs.
featuresShowcase.schedulingDesc: Your time, your terms. Book any available slot in the next 14 days, with instant confirmation for same-day emergency callouts.
featuresShowcase.verifiedNetworkDesc: Every single technician undergoes rigorous background checks. Only the top 2% of applicants make it to your front door.

howItWorks.sectionDesc: We've combined technology with expertise to give you a seamless experience.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Getting help is as easy as dropping a pin. Our geolocation service accurately detects your villa or apartment coordinates for precision arrival.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Say goodbye to 'maybe tomorrow'. Pick a specific date and dynamic time slot that fits your busy life.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Our vetted experts perform the work efficiently. Relax knowing every job is backed by the DHC PRO Quality Guarantee.

footer.companyDesc: Expert home services and electronics maintenance platform serving Dubai and Saudi Arabia.

login.heroSubtitle: Manage bookings, track technicians, and access secure payments.

signup.successToast: Account created successfully. Please log in.
signup.passwordError: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
signup.nameError: Please enter a valid full name.

acTypePage.tipDesc: Choosing the correct unit helps us send the right tools.

issuePage.title: What's wrong?
issuePage.subtitle: Select symptoms that best describe the issue.

placeholders.ac: e.g., AC is making a clicking sound twice every hour...
placeholders.electrical: e.g., The main DB trips whenever I turn on the water heater...
placeholders.plumbing: e.g., Water is leaking from the kitchen sink pipe...
placeholders.cleaning: e.g., Need deep cleaning for a 3-bedroom villa before moving in...
placeholders.painting: e.g., Want to paint one wall in the living room Navy Blue...
placeholders.tile: e.g., Three tiles in the bathroom floor are cracked and loose...
placeholders.washing_machine: e.g., Washing machine is vibrating heavily and not draining...
placeholders.refrigerator: e.g., Fridge is making a loud buzzing noise and not cooling...
placeholders.contractor: e.g., Need a wall removed and plastering finished in the hall...

reviewSubmitPage.title: Review & Confirm

reviewSubmitPage.pricingPolicyDesc: For complex issues, our technician will provide an exact, transparent quote on-site after inspection. Work begins only after your approval.

guide.bannerTitle: Getting fixed has never been easier.
guide.bannerSubtitle: We've combined technology with expertise to give you a seamless experience.

orderDetailPage.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this order?
orderDetailPage.orderNotFoundDesc: This order doesn't exist or you don't have permission to view it.

timelineSteps.pendingDesc: Your service request has been received
timelineSteps.in_progressDesc: A technician is working on your request
timelineSteps.completedDesc: Your service has been completed successfully

aboutPage.heroDesc: Fixora was born out of a simple frustration: finding reliable, skilled technicians shouldn't be a gamble. We built a bridge between high-end technology and manual craftsmanship.
aboutPage.visionDesc: To redefine the home services industry in the Middle East by making excellence the baseline, not the exception.
aboutPage.promiseDesc: Every job is backed by the Fixora Quality Guarantee. If it's not fixed right, we'll make it right. No questions asked.
aboutPage.value1Desc: Our technicians are not just workers; they are certified experts who care about your comfort.
aboutPage.value2Desc: We use only the best tools and materials to ensure longevity of every repair.
aboutPage.value3Desc: From geolocation arrival tracking to instant online booking, we use tech to save your time.
aboutPage.ctaTitle: Ready to experience the future of home services?

contactPage.title: Get in touch.
contactPage.subtitle: We're here to help you 24/7. Reach out through any channel.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.lastUpdated: Your privacy is our priority. Last updated: April 07, 2026
privacyPage.dpoDesc: Have specific privacy concerns? Reach our DPO directly.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.clarificationDesc: If you have any questions regarding these terms, please contact our legal department at

pricingPage.title: Service Directory & Pricing
pricingPage.subtitle: Real-time Gulf region service rates. All prices include labor and professional assessment.
pricingPage.disclaimer: Final on-site quotes may vary based on specific spare parts requirement or accessibility. Inclusive of labor and basic diagnostics.

privacy.section1Content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, book a service, or contact support. This includes your name, email, phone number, and location data required for service delivery.
privacy.section2Content: Your data is used solely to provide and improve Fixora's services, including connecting you with technicians, processing bookings, and sending service updates. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacy.section3Content: Because Fixora is a location-based service, we use geolocation data to ensure technicians arrive at the correct address. We only access this data when you are actively using the platform to book or track a service.
privacy.section5Content: You have the right to request access...

terms.section1Content: By accessing or using the Fixora platform...
terms.section5Content: This agreement is governed by the laws...
